programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona really wants to stay up to see the moon - it's a Supermoon!
Baba finds a shiny shell and wants to take it everywhere with him, but Oona realises the shell is attracting unwanted attention from the seagulls.
Dad's pretend Zoo is great fun, but Punky is not keen when the fun must end.
Keepy Uppy: Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy Uppy around the house with their last balloon, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.
Dylan the Space Commander wants to protect the planets, but when one of Saturn's rings falls off, it's going to take the whole crew to set things right.
Dylan the Fashion Designer wants to create the most special, brand new look ever - but coming up with that look is a lot harder than he thought!
Daniel Tiger goes to the park to play with his toy, Ducky, but Prince Wednesday doesn't like Ducky.
Fia and her best friend Ameer learn about the enchanting Irish language through exciting adventures with a pair of fairies and their magical friends.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'g', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We rock out on the guitar, meet a goat and score a goal!
The team heads to the ancient Peruvian city of Machu Picchu, to watch Kyan compete in the Inca Trail Marathon.
Mufflerkrunked: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
Mealsicle: Oswaldo searches for the mealsicle he once bought from a beach vendor.
Big Babies: Oswaldo decides to join the preschool class.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Storm of Likes: Fur Taxi has a new fare: they need to deliver Samson to a planet where he'll broadcast his livestream and get likes for it.
Happy First Day: Happy reveals how he found his love of water.
The Library Badge: When the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting Duggee's library, they have an idea. A mobile library!
When Sonia and Hugo face a disagreement while playing a game, they learn to find a solution that cares for all. (SL)
Sonia feels frustrated that her doodle doesn't look the way she wants until she learns there is more to art that you can see. (SL)
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)
Oona really wants to stay up to see the moon - it's a Supermoon!
Baba finds a shiny shell and wants to take it everywhere with him, but Oona realises the shell is attracting unwanted attention from the seagulls.
Dad's pretend Zoo is great fun, but Punky is not keen when the fun must end.
The Zip Express: Plom, Phoebe, Mae-Mae, Hooper, Zip and Fly board the Zip Express, a train that takes them across Pop Paper City.
It is Henry's very first day at school and he meets an apple on the teacher's desk. The teacher is not feeling well so Henry decides to step in as a substitute teacher.
A Few Dino Too Many!: The Game Catchers find themselves on a Beachy Planet and learn the game 'Pour and Fill'.
Chasing Clouds: The Game Catchers reach the Jelly Planet.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Goodnight Gordon: When Thomas and his friends accidentally wake Gordon up from his nap, they make it their mission to help Gordon fall back asleep.
Mouse and Dragon go in search of a flying magic flute. But they have to be careful because the flute's melody makes animals dance incessantly!
Lily discovers a piece of pipe on the beach and imagines it to be a telescope.
Lily finds a piece of cloth and imagines that it could be from a carnival on Driftwood Bay.
Tá Peppa agus a teaghlach ag dul ar thuras canú. Faigheann siad canú ó Miss Rabbit agus téann siad síos an abhainn inti.
Téann Peppa agus a teaghlach ar saoire sa ngrian i dteach saoire, ach an athróidh an aimsir?
Madraí Mara: Tá Breacaí ag baint sult as lá spraoi ar an trá nuair a chuireann Madraí Mara isteach uirthi. Téann sí ar eachtra breacaireachta faoi thoinn, ag casadh leis an rí cantalach!
AOIFE: Cuidíonn Breacaí le hAOIFE-01, róbó cairdiúil atá faoi bhrú mór an strus a laghdú ar bhealach spraíúil - le breacphictiúir!
Tumadh níos doimhne: Tá Oona ag cleachtadh a cuid scileanna tumadóireachta agus Baba, Bernie agus Silky ag tacú léi.
Lá amuigh: Tá pluais na bpuifíní fliuch báite i ndiaidh stoirm na hoíche agus socraíonn Daidí 'lá amuigh' don teaghlach.
Doodle Song: Doodle wants to have a song of her own.
Friendly Rivalry: Nemi invites Grace to his house to have a sleepover. But when Nemi's parents are complimentary to Grace, Nemi becomes jealous.
Black Bears: Andy and Kip head to North America to see black bears, following a bee that leads them to where the animals are eating honey and climbing trees with their cubs.
Mufflerkrunked: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.

Flynne helps Oona to find Mossy, and proves she can be a friendly fox.
Oona and Baba search for soft bedding for their burrow.
Punky isn't getting included in a game however when she gets her turn she shows them how to play!
Daddy Robot: Bluey and Bingo get Daddy Robot to clean the playroom when they don't want to do it, but Daddy Robot ends up malfunctioning.
Dylan the Sea Captain wants to be the best captain ever, but he soon discovers a sea captain is nothing without his crew!
Dylan the Sculptor wants to sell all his statues - but his statues have minds of their own!
The Tiger Family prepares for Margaret's birthday party, but Daniel struggles when the attention is not on him.
Fia and her best friend Ameer learn about the enchanting Irish language through exciting adventures with a pair of fairies and their magical friends.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'h', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see a helicopter, look inside a house and hug a hamster!
GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees.
Troy's New Toy: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
Secret Santa: It's time for the school's Secret Santa draw. But who is Albert?
SCI-FI Fair: The school's organized a Science Fair and Leia couldn't be more excited.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Quest for Coolness: Lex, Plu, Greg, and Crispy go to a hotel to relax but also to try out every winter activities possible: skiing, skating, snowboarding, and so much more.
Tag's First Day: Tag learns the importance of listening on his first day.
The Hat Badge: Duggee and the Squirrels introduce King Tiger to lots of different hats and explain what they might be good for. But none of them feels right to him.
Sonia, Hugo, and Mel create full of heart memories with Mom, Dad, and Granny on those playful days spent with family and friends. (SL)
Sonia, Hugo, Mel and Poi make many fun discoveries while searching for a chirping cricket. (SL)
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)
Flynne helps Oona to find Mossy, and proves she can be a friendly fox.
Oona and Baba search for soft bedding for their burrow.
Punky isn't getting included in a game however when she gets her turn she shows them how to play!
Doctor Mae-Mae: Plom's favourite toy is broken, so Doctor Mae-Mae promises to fix it.
Henry meets a friendly toothbrush in the bathroom. His first tooth falls out while brushing his teeth and Henry cannot wait until the tooth fairy comes!
Two devoted scarecrows plan a wedding to remember. Adaptation of the children's book by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler, starring Rob Brydon, Jessie Buckley and Domhnall Gleeson.
Sir Knight has designed suits of armour. Mouse will model a very special one at the fair, a golden suit of armour. She adjusts it to fit her better, but is unable to remove it!
Lily finds a hooty horn washed up on the beach and on the crossing to Driftwood Bay she meets some silly seals.
Lily finds a pirate's scarf on the beach and decides to search for treasure on Driftwood Bay with Puffin, who seems like an ideal pirate's shipmate.
Tá Peppa agus a teaghlach ag dul ag an bPáirc Uisce. Is í Miss Rabbit atá i gceannas.
Tá Peppa agus George ag teach Granny agus Grandpa agus iad ag iarraidh spraoi. Tá culaith dineasáir ar Granny.
Sos Péinteála: Caithfidh Breacaí cuidiú le surfálaí atá in ísle brí a bhothán trá a dheisiú in am don Sárchomórtas Scléipeach Surfála.
An Cháis Draíochta: Téann Breacaí agus a cairde, ar mhisean rúnda leis an lámh in uachtar a fháil ar dhá chat chrua atá ag tabhairt cosaint do cháis draíochta a fhíoraíonn mianta do chroí!
Scoil na n-ulchabhán: Tá Oona agus Baba ar scoil na n-ulchabhán ag foghlaim scileanna le fiach, eitilt go ciúin agus amharc in san dorchadas.
Lá te: Lá te atá ann agus tá na hainmhithe ar fad ag fulaingt sa teas.
Reggie: The owl brings a fox to show and tell.
Meerkats: Kip and Andy see meerkats in South Africa and help them have breakfast.
Troy's New Toy: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
